block_01: With the holidays quickly approaching, we would like to take a moment to highlight important changes to IQ Option’s trading schedule during the holidays.
block_02: Please kindly note that markets will be closed on April 19, 2019 and April 22 (till 1:30 pm UTC), 2019. Over the counter (OTC) assets will be available for trading.
block_03: Should you have any questions, feel free to get in touch with our Support team, available 24/7 via chat, email or phone.
